hotel_name: Novotel Hà Nội Thái Hà (Novotel Hanoi Thai Ha)

reviews.title: NHÂN VIÊN XÔNG VÀO PHÒNG
reviews.text: Mình đang ngủ lúc 6h sáng nhân viên mặc đồ đen thui tự ý xông vào phòng mở cửa phòng. mình có khoá xong mà còn làm rơi cái khoá trong phòng mình rồi nói là tưởng trả phòng. Thiếu chuyên nghiệp và nguy hiểm
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Not a five star hotel at all far from the tourist attractions.
reviews.positives: Gym was ok not all equipment worked properly
reviews.negatives:
The service was very bad.
When we came to do check in the lady in the front desk changed the room number in front of us we came to a room with nasty smell that was not cleaned after we talked to them we got a room that was clean but had a different type of problem everyday first the ac wasn’t working after the door lock battery and then the laundry machine problems that made us spend lots of quality time with the hotel technicians in the room instead of enjoying our vacation. When we finally had enough and said that the situation can’t keep going that way they tried to change the laundry machine and not changed the room as they told us finally they have changed the room to a room that was ok . And the breakfast to go was disgusting as it came completely frozen including the coffee and tea that was supposed to be provided.

reviews.title: Horrible Place
reviews.text: We Booked two rooms for family and they gave us two different floors and even second day they are not willing to give in same floor. Break fast is terrible and hotel is in Junction with lot of noise. Hard to sleep.  You would be better off booking cheaper hotel.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room, 2 Single size Beds, City View

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Very old property , rooms are nice but doesn’t give you a 5 star feeling.
reviews.negatives: Over all was not great

reviews.title: Not a good stay
reviews.text: We were not informed of the maintenance work. There are abseiling guys cleaning the glass wall that created noise and inconvenience.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Good but turns terrible when they couldn’t refund the deposit (overcharged) amount to my account
reviews.positives: Clean & Spacious Room
reviews.negatives: They took around $600 deposit for the stay and it took forever to be returned to the customer. Anyone who have intention to stay at this hotel must be careful of their return process while checkout.

reviews.title: Disappointed Experience
reviews.text: I stayed here for a few times and beside it's dated room, I quite like this property (previously).  However, I am very disappointed with Novotel Thai Ha this time.  I requested for a higher floor, quiet, and non-smoking room.  But what was given to me was a room at 4th floor, with a drinking/gambling club on the same floor.  Very strong cigarette smell on the floor.  I noticed a few strangers (not hotel guests and not staff with uniform) on that floor and use the "private door" to go out.  Luckily my room card wasn't working, I got a chance to went down again to request a change of room.  But the whole experience made me very uncomfortable.  For a moment in the 4th floor, I was wondering whether am I really at Novotel group of hotel???  Not to mention about the dated room with poor maintenance.  Plus that ridiculous and stupid bathroom/toilet design.  Inconsistent hot/cold water.  Ms Thao is kind of rude this time.  Cold face, no smile and not friendly at all during my check out.  All she bother is whether I consume the minibar.  I will never come back again.  With the price that you are paying to this property, you can have many more options in Hanoi.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: OK option, good breakfast
reviews.positives:
Enjoyed the high floor view. Japanese type toilet. The room was comfortable, design is good, not exceptional.
The room felt spacious, bed was comfortable.

The breakfast is of wide variety, perhaps worth the price.
reviews.negatives:
The swimming pool was under construction, we were warned about it upon arrival, yet the whole pool are did not feel welcoming.
SPA services were very disappointing. It seems like western brand hotel should maintain western standards, but the SPA, massages were so much worse than SPA centers.

Washing service cost is per item only, which makes it expensive, especially when comparing to other hotels were they price per kilo. Not sure if any additional services are worth the price.

Weird bathroom design where water is supposed to run on the floor.

reviews.title: The service is terrible.
reviews.text: We went to the restaurant for breakfast a bit late, and the guy just told us to sit at the far tables but didn't stick us to the table area he mentioned.  When he saw we just sit at the table not the area he mentioned, just rudely yelled in the far side, and told us to sit in the corner. I got upset, and questioned, where is the area, why is nobody to stick us the tables? Then one lady came to stick us to the corner table. So terrible service.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Good without a complaint
reviews.positives: Overall clean
reviews.negatives: Confidence with the brand

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.text: An absolutely terrible experience. The service isn’t even worth 3 stars, let alone 5. I will never come back, and I’ll write a detailed review on Google soon thanks
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single size Beds, City View

reviews.title: I will come again
reviews.positives: Clean , comfortable
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Need improvement
reviews.text: Quite disappointed for a 5 star hotel. On my last day the AC suddenly leaking. Breakfast is standard, but wish that for a 5 star hotel, could been better (at least a coffee with proper coffee maker) .  The room was nice. However sound proof need to be improved, i can easily hear people talking in the hallway. The door lock , is only by card, it didn’t feel secure, wish that there is also a manual door latch.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: happy and come back again
reviews.positives: MacDonald , kitchen
reviews.negatives: shower bathroom smells not good

reviews.title: Family Vacation Trip
reviews.text:
If you are traveling for holiday with family then better to book hotel in old town area as all activities are there only. Novotel Thai Ha's location is very dead kind as nothing to do around and no good eating joints nearby except one Mcdonalds across the road and one or two coffee shops plus one or two restaurants serving local food. Also their rooms are very poorly designed though room size is good. Also the room services very poor as we had to call 2-3 times to get services. 
One late night my spouse fell from bed while getting up to go to washroom and had an injury. On calling hotel front desk we were told that their is no first aid kit and no doctor on call. ..we asked for ice to stop the blood which took them more than 10mins and that too after repeated calls
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Memorable stay
reviews.positives: Location superb
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Customer service of this hotel
reviews.text:
There is no staff to welcome and assist with luggage when guests arrive, female guests carry their own very heavy suitcases.
When it was time to check out and leave, there was still no staff to help the female customer carry her suitcase to the car. Extremely bad service, not equal to a 2-star hotel, Novotel does not deserve to be a 4.5-star hotel.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The hotel was friendly and knowledgeable to what ever we needed!
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Big room
reviews.text:
Large room. Breakfast has a good selection, however staff don’t smile and atmosphere heavy. Washing machine in room is convenient but there’s no quick cycle for rinsing swimmers. Good pool but environment needs an upgrade, it’s sparse and unwelcoming. About 20-25 mins to the old quarter by grab. Water pressure in shower is so so. Getting a late checkout took effort. One of the few hotels in Asia who will NOT give a complimentary late check out. They wanted to charge 2m VND. Managed to get 1 hour by signing up to Accor.
Of the international chains, my least favourite as quality of service and environment is lacking.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Everything was as good as you can expect from a high quality hotel.
reviews.negatives: I booked the property at a late hour (around 21.00-22.00) and my booking was not available at their system immediately, so I had to wait more than an hour to check in my room. The staff was helpful but they should solve this issue for future late bookings.

reviews.title: 2025 March 26-30
reviews.text:
the hotel lobby looks great, thanks for many sofa seats at the lobby for guests, located next to a shopping street, few restaurants at the opposite building

the room is new, well decorated, modern designed, good maintenance, in-room cleanliness is perfect, thanks to good quality bed and pillows for my good sleeps, water pressure for shower is very good

the aircon is not too strong, hope it could be stronger

i don't like to take shower inside bathtub, it might post to safety risk of slip and fall, perfectly fine to me if hotel management decided to remove the bathtub completely

i felt shaking during the earthquake happened in Myanmar during my stay, thanks Gods that the hotel building is perfectly fine, not collapsed and i am blessed i am still safe
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.positives: Very nice hotel and great service.

reviews.title: Decent place with good location
reviews.text: Overall ok place to stay, though traffic noises and honking can be heard even at like 2am or 6am. Premier lounge was a little disappointing and underwhelming, just go for a standard room without lounge access

reviews.title: Not 5 star
reviews.text:
Pros: strategic location. Nearby to all my work purpose location. 
Cons:
- bad customer service. Receptionist always engaged.
- late room service.
- bathroom door not working despite fixed by worker.
- no good selection for breakfast. Everyday same. 
- room lighting so dim
- pillow very thin.

reviews.title: good!
reviews.text: Still soft opening. pool, gym was closed. Breakfast was great. Room is big and clean.
reviews.response:
Dear Sadaharu, 

Thank you very much for your time to share your experience at Novotel Hanoi Thai Ha!

We are very happy to hear that you have been satisfied with the room as much as the breakfast we are delivering. Knowing that as a newly opened hotel, we 
are working hard with hope to welcome you back very soon with full facilities ready. 
Once again thank you very much for your time to share your feedback. 
Safe travels ahead! 

Very Best, 
Minh Thu (Autumn)
Cluster Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Great hotel and great value for the outstanding service.
reviews.positives:
Nice, clean property. The staff is incredible and level of service outstanding. Especially thanks to Lynn who does everything she can to make you feel at home. The breakfast was wonderful with a great variety of fresh and tasty options.
A wonderful hotel where I would be happy to return. I like the Spa also.

reviews.title: Location, room condition, size, etc. are good for the price.
reviews.text:
1. The location is at the local center, making it easy to access the Korean area and the old town.
2. The room condition is quite good, and its size is excellent compared to other hotels in the same price range.
3. I had trouble using the Agoda benefits related to the hotel, possibly due to poor communication.

Overall, I am satisfied and considering using it again in the future.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Laundry Bag is chargeable ZZZZ
reviews.text: I'm a frequent business traveler in Asia and APAC. I have stay in many 5 stars hotel in different countries. Only Novotel Thai Ha, Laundry bag is chargeable to customer. During check out, I was informed by reception staff that laundry back is chargeable, it is crazy experience I had compared to other 5 stars hotel services. I will not stay this hotel again.

reviews.title: Exceptional

Definitely value for money.  Good hotel,  nice buffet,  nice room very big in general standards.  The bathroom is also big. 
The service of the people is amazing
reviews.negatives: The location is not the best.  Outside old quarter  and in a noisy traffic intersection.  If you like a quiet room you need a high floor room, then the situation improves

reviews.title: Not pleasant
reviews.text:
The room design is weird. The bathroom is way too small compared to the other room area. Bathroom is separated by two sliding doors that were heavy and cannot be fully closed. The bathtub is incorporated with the shower and is really just for show. Receptionists were not pleasant to talk to.

Gym was nice with lots of modern equipments.

結果は特に問題無く、手配頂けました。

reviews.title: 快適なホテル
reviews.positives:
早めの時間帯に朝食を取ったので静かにゆったりと色々な食材を楽しむことが出来ましたが、同僚の話では遅い時間帯では混雑しており、食材の補充も不十分であったとのことでした。
部屋は必要十分で質の良い設備が整っており、また窓からの景色も良かったです。
reviews.negatives: ホテル周辺を散策しましたが、適当な食事がとれるローカルフードのお店を見つけられなかったのでタクシーで少し離れたエリアまで行くことになりました。（おそらくホテル内のレストランでの食事がベストだったと思います。）

Good breakfast spread kept us full throughout the day … a little away from centre and that’s the only issue to circumvent ! All in all a v good experience

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Phòng nhỏ, sạch sẽ, hiện đại. Nhà tắm nhỏ xinh đầy đủ tiện nghi nhưng thiết kế chưa thuận tiện, mỗi lần tắm nước chảy tràn ra ngoài. Tôi ở phòng 2 giường đơn, mỗi giường chỉ có 1 gối (Các khách sạn đúng chuẩn 4 sao trở lên sẽ có 2 gối lớn nhỏ cho 1 chỗ nằm).
Vị trí khách sạn không phải ở trung tâm nhưng nằm trên tuyến đường đông đúc, thuận tiện đi lại.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single size Beds, City View

reviews.title: Thật tệ khi ở khách sạn này.lần sau không đến
reviews.positives: Không
reviews.negatives:
1. Két sắt hỏng 
2. Gọi nhân viên để nhờ sửa két sắt nhưng phải đợi mất 40p mặc dù nói là tới ngay. 
3. Không có túi giặt là. Gọi nhưng mãi không ai mang đến
4. Phòng tắm và phòng vệ sinh không thoát nước. Nước bì bõm. Lỡ trượt chân té thì sao?
5. Đêm đầu tiên đã phàn nàn. Nhân viên bảo là xử lý nhưng không xử lý gì.

reviews.title: Evaluation
reviews.text: The hotel has a convenient location, close to the city center. The rooms are clean and fully equipped. The staff are friendly and enthusiastic. Suitable for business trips.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single size Beds, City View

reviews.title: Tồi tệ
reviews.positives: Điểm duy nhất hài lòng là vị trí khách sạn.
reviews.negatives: Nhân viên nói chuyện không lễ phép, bảo vệ rất thái độ khi thấy khách đỗ xe trước sảnh khách sạn để dỡ hành lý check in và check out, không hỗ trợ khách mà còn ra đuổi xe của khách ra khỏi khu vực sảnh khách sạn. Không có người dỡ hành lý và vận chuyển hành lý. Nhân viên dọn phòng không dọn phòng mặc dù khách đã yêu cầu dọn từ sáng sớm, mãi đến 17h chiều mới có người vào dọn phòng. Khách có để quên 01 sạc điện thoại trước khi check out khách sạn, tuy nhiên khách sạn không kiểm tra lại phòng trước khi cho khách check out, khách gọi điện claim thì nhận được phản hồi không có bất kỳ đồ vật nào đc để quên lại. Tôi khẳng định là có để quên 01 sạc trên phòng 1808, dưới chân tivi.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Phòng rộng rãi, sạch sẽ. Nhân viên rất chu đáo (cả lễ tân, NV phòng, và nhà hàng)
reviews.negatives: Phòng hơi có mùi ẩm mốc phía ghế sofa, không rõ mùi từ sàn hay nệm ghế hay màn che. Khu vực sảnh nhà hàng (khi vừa ra khỏi thang máy) có mùi khá nồng, phía trong thì ổn hơn, không có mùi. Buffet sáng có nhiều món nhưng có vẻ chưa cân đối thành phần dinh dưỡng lắm khi có quá nhiều món nhiều tinh bột, ít đạm.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: We stayed here for 5 nights as holidaymakers. The hotel is quite new, bright and clean. The hotel appears to cater more for business travellers and this is reflected when you see the clientele at breakfast and checkin. Rooms are well appointed (bidet is a nice touch). Views from our room on the 24th floor were amazing. The big highlight of this hotel is the staff. Always so bubbly and welcoming this is their greatest asset. A special mention to the three awesome ladies at the checkin counter. They could not make our stay more pleasant and are deserving of accolades!! The hotel is about 20mins from the Old Quarter (generally about 85,000vnd) and relatively cheap to visit. A lovely stay helped by a super hotel and awesome staff. Recommended.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Clean and spacious with views
reviews.text: Stayed for 3 nights, got upgraded to the apartment room which has kitchen, a living room and a separate bedroom, the view was really great for watching sunrises and the busy motorbikes traffic.   The staffs are nice and the 4 elevators are fast and efficient.   It’s located around 30min from the old town district, there’s less touristy local markets, cafes and restaurants nearby to experience the local way of life.  There’s McDonald’s and Starbucks across the street if you feel homesick as well as a coffee shop that offers banquettes.      This hotel should be one of your considerations if you’re after a nice and quiet place to stay, local places exploring and as a base for different day trips visit to other sightseeing places.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Stay August 2022
reviews.text: Staff and food were the best, the only thing that reduced my rating was the gym and spa not open

reviews.title: Bitterly miserable & uncomfortable
reviews.positives: Lobby Area is well designed
reviews.negatives: The damn AC does not work very well inspite of more than one request to the reception staff. Their famed rooftop bar was not ready and they chose to not tell us when we were booking. Their bar below shuts off @ 10pm and their suggestion to us was to go Old City if we wanted to have a drink...

reviews.title: Superb service
reviews.text: Everything was good. The staff was accommodating, friendly and had initiative. The breakfast buffet was great! The sauna area with jacuzzi was amazing. My family and I had fun. I just wish they'd clean their pool more often. It had insects/bugs and it wasn't the cleanest.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Very disappointing
reviews.positives: Staff get 5 stars for their efforts to post (at our expense) some clothing we left behind- thank you. Otherwise, this was so far the most expensive hotel we stayed at and the most disappointing 🙁. Having stayed in a wonderful hotel in the heart of the old town of Hanoi, we thought we would lash out ( more than twice the price per night) for a ‘club room’ and all the benefits this brings. Very, very disappointing. Rubbish offer.
reviews.negatives: The ‘Club’ which we thought was on a spectacular high floor, was closed, and relocated to a meeting room on the ground floor. It was absolute rubbish, nothing like the promised luxury service. Novotel have disappointed . Booking.com has disappointed, not for the first time on this Vietnam holiday

reviews.title: Great hospitality
reviews.text: All staf are so helpful and friendly, the hotel is so clean and well designed. Our room is upgraded at our last night stay which completed our memorable visit to Hanoi.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The location of Novotel Thai Ha is close to get to local areas where the locals would usually be located but I wouldn’t advise this place for anyone wanting to visit places like Old Quarter town and tourist destinations as it’s a bit far out from it.
reviews.negatives: I have previously stayed at Novotel Thai Ha in the past and it has exceeded my expectations but this time I have been shocked. The hotel has deteriorated quickly. The room felt old, bathroom wasn’t as clean and regardless of booking oke of their most premium rooms there was no welcome delights like there was previously when I stayed. I travel to Vietnam every year and stay at Novotel Thai Ha every time so it’s not like I haven’t been in a while.

Aircondition vents were not sufficient to cool the entire room.
Breakfast buffet has very few choices.

reviews.title: Lacking customer service
reviews.positives: The room was good of size and the location good for business
reviews.negatives: While check in we found that there was made a mistake with the reservation for one of us.(total 3 rooms) Then the check in staff said there was only an apartment available for 10mio VND further fully booked. Which is extreme. Then  i checked booking.com and had a room way less expensive and I even got the question if I would like high or low floor while it was fully booked? Note we arrived in the late evening in the hotel.

reviews.title: Everything is very ideal.
reviews.text: There is a small convenience store and pharmacy downstairs, and it's very convenient to take a taxi to the city center in just 10 minutes. The room is spacious enough, which is important for accommodating older children. I have high standards, but the hotel is clean, the swimming pool is just right, and the staff are polite. The breakfast is also well-prepared and meets the quality of Novotel. This is the most ideal hotel among the three on this trip.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single size Beds, City View

reviews.negatives: Spa area, jacuzzi not all jets working. Asked to give half hour notice to turn on steam room and sauna. Not on ! Asked at spa to turn on , twice.  Didn't happen.

reviews.title: Well trained staff with service in mind

reviews.title: A lovely place to stay if location is not important. Shame we did not know about the restaurant earlier.
reviews.positives: The room was lovely. Staff were helpful.
reviews.negatives: We cannot understand why more information was not provided about the availability of the restaurant. In fact the only available information suggests it is closed Monday, Tuesday and Wednesday evenings with a food exchange later in the week. No wonder it was empty! We actually ate there on the Tuesday evening and it was fabulous.  Why the opening times/dates were not openly advertised is anyone’s guess. Also the information on the room TV was poor and out of date.

reviews.title: New and clean
reviews.text: It's new and clean. Staff is ok, should be more active.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Quang, 

Greetings from Novotel Hanoi Thai Ha!
Thank you very much for your time to share your feedback. We are all glad that you have found our hotel new and clean, however, it is a pity that we failed to show you our enthusiasm during your stay. 
I have shared your comments to the whole team, and we look forward to welcome you back soon to show our improvement. 
Safe travels ahead!

Minh Thu (Autumn)
Cluster Guest Experience Manager
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

I arrived early around 8 o'clock to the hotel after 11h night flight. I have been told my room is still not ready that's why they can not give me the room, then they said, if I need a room I need to make early check in and this is something I did not appreciate it.
Also when I got the room, there were lots of long hair everywhere in the room, so I had to mention that and clean it on the next day.

跟爸媽家人一起來河內玩，雖然正值農曆年間越南很多地方都休息，連叫車也叫不到，但是飯店櫃檯人員非常友善跟努力的協助我們前往舊城區，指引了我們去搭公車～也有跟我們說可以下載當地的app來叫車會比較方便，服務100分👍🏽
設施、早餐、房間就不用說了，完全很滿意👌🏽

reviews.title: I can spend time very comfortably.
reviews.text: I chose this hotel because it is the closest to my office, and it is very comfortable with no complaints about the facilities. I believe it is one of the better hotels in Hanoi. Of course, it is more expensive than others, but it has become an essential hotel for focusing on business. I would like to continue using it in the future. The breakfast has a variety of options; it’s not particularly good, but it is good enough.

reviews.negatives: As I stayed due to a conference, a lot of my fellow colleagues also stayed at the hotel. I had an exceptional stay and would recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Spacious room
reviews.text: I had a great stay at Novotel in Hanoi. The room was very spacious, food is delicious. Room service had a bit of an issue but they sent me free fruits as a form of apology. The hotel is beautiful and modern.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Excellent stay, highly recommend!
reviews.text: We had a fantastic stay at this property. The location was perfect for shopping and walking around the area. The pool was great and the facilities were top-notch. The staff were very friendly and accommodating. Our room was always clean and the hot water worked perfectly. We highly recommend staying here for the value for money. Overall, an exceptional experience!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: A hotel that is also great for business trips.
reviews.text: A very comfortable hotel with a good location and delicious food; I plan to keep staying here for future business trips to Hanoi.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: New hotel with amazing service
reviews.text: I would definitely recommend this hotel. The staff was great. They had initiative and were kind throughout our stay. The rooms were big, cozy and modern. They were also clean. The breakfast buffet was great with a variety of options everyday. The pool though isn’t too clean for my taste. I wish they would clean this more. However, I loved the sauna, jacuzzi, gym and stram areas near the pool. It was clean and well maintained. I would definitely go back with my family.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Nice rooms - great food. Toilet dirty when I checked in to my room. 
Many of the electrical plug outlets were low quality and too loose to keep the plug connected.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: ok
reviews.text: ok
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Phong,
Greetings from Novotel Suites Hanoi,
Thank you for your precious time to share your experience with Novotel Suites Hanoi!
We are all glad to know that you have enjoyed your stay with complete satisfaction. It is our hope to welcome you back very soon!
Stay safe and Happy New Year!
Very Best,
Minh Thu
Cluster Guest Experience Manager
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: A very pleasant stay!
reviews.text: We had a very pleasant stay, the room was very big and clean and had an amazing view! We will definitely come again 👍🏻
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Sehr schönes Hotel
reviews.text: Da dass Hotel in der Nähe meiner Großeltern ist, buche ich es jedes Mal wenn ich in Hanoi bin. Es enttäuscht mich nie!! Die Zimmer sind riesig und superschön!! Alles sehr sauber und das Personal sehr freundlich! Ich gehe weiterhin gerne hierhin!
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single size Beds, City View

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text:
Room was spacious with an amazing city view. Breakfast was good quality. Bedroom was comfy with good quality linen. The bell man helped us with the luggage and he was really kind. 
Swimming pool is good but the bar is abandoned and there are no sun umbrela.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 1 King size Bed, City View

reviews.title: Below par service and surprise intrusion
reviews.text:
We tried calling front desk more than 5 times between 12.30 noon to 1.30pm but no one picked up the call.

Also, on the day we were supposed to check out, someone (I assume the housekeeper) knocked on the door , opened and pushed the door right in though we were still in the room. Luckily we had the door chained up.

reviews.title: 房间很奇葩
reviews.text: 地理位置很偏，远离老城区。房间设计很奇葩，房间看上去很大，但是是不规则的三角形，很多空间都浪费了，空在那，反而洗手间非常小，一开房门就是洗手间，但洗手间非常小，空间窄小，转个身都不方便，门都不好开，这种房型很不喜欢。但是酒店的doorman还是要表扬，主动帮我提重行李，一直帮忙到上出租车，这点非常棒的。
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single size Beds, City View

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 旅游来说位置有点偏了，打车去还剑湖要5-6美元，早餐种类不太多，口味还不错。房间面积不大，设施也一般，客房服务还不错。6楼顶的游泳池水很冷，水居然是咸的，也没有人服务，救生员都没有。
reviews.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single size Beds, City View
